desc: Well-maintained ranch on 0.7+ acres in one of Middletown's finest neighborhoods. Huge family room addition with patio slider, spacious eat-in kitchen with pantry. Finished basement with 3 rooms. Underground sprinkler, oversized shed. Close to GSP, train & ferry.
description:
Well-maintained ranch set on over 0.7 acres in one of Middletown's finest neighborhoods, offering space, privacy, and superb commuter access.

A large family room addition provides generous living space with a patio slider opening to the backyard. The spacious eat-in kitchen features a full pantry. The finished basement adds three additional rooms — perfect for a home office, gym, or guest space. Outside, an underground sprinkler system keeps the grounds lush, and an oversized shed provides ample storage.

Close to the Garden State Parkway, NJ Transit train, and the NY Waterway ferry.
